transactions.desc: Washington cleared waivers Saturday and was sent outright to High-A Everett.
The Giants reinstated Oliva (wrist) from the 60-day injured list Saturday and designated him for assignment, Shayna Rubin of the San Francisco Chronicle reports.
The Blue Jays optioned Little to Triple-A Buffalo on Saturday.
The Blue Jays reinstated Estrada (shoulder) from the injured list Saturday.
The Blue Jays optioned McAdoo to Triple-A Buffalo on Saturday.
The Blue Jays reinstated Varsho (wrist) from the injured list Saturday.
The Mariners designated Mastrobuoni for assignment Friday.
The Mariners selected Wilson's contract from Triple-A Tacoma on Friday.
The Padres optioned Rodriguez to the Arizona Complex League on Friday.
The Padres reinstated Miller from the Bereavement/Family Medical Leave List Friday.
Cleveland optioned Dion to Triple-A Columbus on Friday, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.
The Guardians activated Sabrowski (elbow) from the 15-day injured list Friday, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.
The Rangers optioned Smith to Triple-A Round Rock on Friday.
The Rangers selected Kelenic's contract from Triple-A Round Rock on Friday.
The Diamondbacks recalled Diaz from Triple-A Reno on Friday.
The Tigers called up Cruz from Triple-A Toledo, and he is starting in right field and batting ninth Friday against the White Sox, Jason Beck of MLB.com reports.
The Royals optioned Black to Triple-A Omaha on Friday.
The Rangers reinstated Lugo (concussion) from the 7-day injured list to start Friday's game against the Nationals.
The Rays designated Slater for assignment Friday, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.
The Rays activated DeLuca (hamstring) from the 10-day injured list Friday, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.
The Blue Jays recalled Little from Triple-A Buffalo on Friday.
The Blue Jays optioned Dallas to Triple-A Buffalo on Friday.
Atlanta activated Bart (foot) from the 10-day injured list Friday.
The Cubs recalled Dean from Triple-A Iowa on Friday, Jared Wyllys of AllCHGO.com reports.
The Atlanta Braves traded RHP Hunter Stratton to the Pittsburgh Pirates.
The Pittsburgh Pirates traded C Joey Bart to the Atlanta Braves.
Atlanta designated Leon for assignment on Thursday.
The Pirates acquired Stratton from Atlanta on Thursday in exchange for Joey Bart.
Ballesteros was optioned to Triple-A Iowa on Thursday, Elias Schuster of SI.com reports.
Pomeranz was released by the Angels on Thursday.
